expected.notes: I-94 and I-20 class of admission match perfectly, so the rule requiring a mismatch is not satisfied.

probe_intent:
Generate a synthetic case where the engine must NOT fire rule 'i94_class_of_admission_mismatch', but that structurally resembles a case that WOULD fire it. Produce a case where ONE of the rule's conditions is deliberately not satisfied while the others are. Rule conditions:
  - comparison.i94_i20_class_of_admission mismatch
No real PII or real-looking government identifiers.
